title: ollama/ollama
summary: Get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama. Chat with local LLMs from Python in a few lines.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama. Works in Node, Bun, Deno and browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama. Drop-in replacement for OpenAI in chains & agents.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (formerly Ollama-WebUI). Markdown, code highlight, RAG.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama. Android compatible.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem for Ollama. Simple idiomatic interface.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive REPL and CLI toolbox (pull, list, delete, benchmark).

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration for retrieval-augmented generation with local LLMs.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes: function-calling, vision, embeddings, fine-tuning, Docker Compose stacks.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & CUDA) and compose examples.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + Streamlit.

title: ollama-vscode
summary: VS Code extension for chatting and generating code with Ollama models inside the editor.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official Ollama JavaScript SDK on npm. 80 kB, zero deps.

title: ollama PyPI
summary: Official Python client on PyPI. 3 kB wheel, supports 3.8+.

title: ollama discussion: tool use beta
summary: Official thread on upcoming function-calling / tool-use support in Ollama.

title: r/ollama: what are you building?
summary: Community showcase thread: RAG apps, Discord bots, Home-Assistant agents, Obsidian plugins.

title: ollama-hnsw
